title: Web Engineering and Booking Engines at Vueling Airlines
description: Implementation of hotel and car rental booking engines, and development of the interface for Vueling Airlines' main booking flows.
body:
Before my time at Newshore, I worked **directly at Vueling Airlines** during a key phase of the company's growth, contributing to the development of its complementary digital services.

## Ancillary Booking Engines

An essential part of the job was implementing the **hotel** and **car rental** booking engines, services that Vueling offered to its customers as a complement to the airline ticket. We needed to integrate with external providers and deliver an experience that was consistent with the rest of the site.

## Booking Flow Design

The **booking flows** were the most critical part of the platform: any friction in the purchase process had a direct impact on revenue. The layout and UI work was closely tied to conversion and usability goals.

## Technologies

-   HTML
-   CSS
-   JavaScript
-   PHP

Client: [vueling.com](https://vueling.com)
